title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup is not present if Charge Case is on latest FW
scenario: Verify that the "Case Update Needed" popup is not displayed when the Charge Case is already on the latest firmware version after earbuds DFU completes.
steps: Launch the app and connect the device (both earbuds).
Once the update is done, go back to Home Screen.
Restart the app and verify the card is still not visible.
expected: "Case Update Needed" card is not visible on the Home Screen, even after restarting the app.
